concerns.text: Task T006 hardcodes anomaly parameters ('mean shift 2.5σ, variance 3x') which contradicts spec.md FR-004 and FR-011 stating these ranges are '[deferred]' and must include 'near-threshold values'. No task exists to implement the configurable parameter logic required by FR-004.

Task T026 implements 'Wilcoxon signed-rank test' but spec.md FR-006 and plan.md (Complexity Tracking) explicitly mandate 'Bootstrap Confidence Intervals' due to F1-score skewness. No task covers the implementation of the Bootstrap CI method required by the plan.

Task T015 requires checking 'R-hat' for convergence, but spec.md US-1 and plan.md specify 'Sparse Variational Inference' (SVI) which reports ELBO stability and ESS. R-hat is for MCMC. No task exists to implement the correct SVI convergence diagnostics (ELBO/ESS) required by the spec.

Task T017 only requests 'logging' for memory usage, but spec.md SC-003 requires the system to *stay* under 7GB. No task exists to implement the enforcement logic (e.g., memory profiling with exit/fail) required to satisfy SC-003.

Task T031 proposes 'fixing spec.md' formatting. This violates Constitution Principle IV (Single Source of Truth) where tasks implement the spec, not edit it. This task is stale/invalid for the current workflow.

Task T032 proposes 'updating plan.md date'. This violates Constitution Principle IV (Single Source of Truth) where tasks implement the plan, not edit it. This task is stale/invalid for the current workflow.
